schema.title: Document Metadata Schema
schema.description: Document metadata (object schema). Extended with optional fields to support template rendering.

id.description: Task ID in format WP###-T### (three digits each, zero-padded).

work_package_id.description: Parent Work Package ID in format WP###.

status.description: Canonical task status vocabulary (blank allowed for partial drafts).

planned_duration_days.description: Canonical 'Planned Duration (d)' field. Numeric WORKING_DAYS preferred; blank allowed.

start_date.description: Start Date in dd-mm-yyyy format; blank until planned/applied.

finish_date.description: Finish Date in dd-mm-yyyy format; blank until planned/applied.

dependencies.description: Canonical 'Dependencies' field (comma-separated Task IDs in table form) or normalized array.

atomic_task_id.description: Task-pool linkage (Atomic Task ID); use em dash or blank if not applicable.

external_dependencies.description: Alias; use 'dependencies' for canonical field naming.

id.description: Work Package ID in format WP### (three digits, zero-padded).

objective.description: Objective field from canonical WP header; blank allowed.

governance.description: Governance field from canonical WP header; blank allowed.

bound_context.description: Canonical Bound Context header field (CS/TP/PROF/CAL) as raw string or normalized object.

planning_basis.description: Canonical Planning Basis header field as raw string or normalized object.

standards_bundle.description: Canonical Standards Bundle header field (single bundle ID or list).

id.description: Task ID in format WP###-T### (three digits each, zero-padded).

status.description: Canonical task status vocabulary (blank allowed for partial drafts).

planned_duration_days.description: Canonical 'Planned Duration (d)' field. Numeric WORKING_DAYS preferred; blank allowed.

start_date.description: Start Date in dd-mm-yyyy format; blank until planned/applied.

finish_date.description: Finish Date in dd-mm-yyyy format; blank until planned/applied.

dependencies.description: Canonical 'Dependencies' field (comma-separated Task IDs in table form) or normalized array.

atomic_task_id.description: Task-pool linkage (Atomic Task ID); use em dash or blank if not applicable.

external_dependencies.description: Alias; use 'dependencies' for canonical field naming.
